subject: Spoink — small pig-like Pokemon with a coiled spring tail, bouncing upward with a pearl on its head, set against a cool grey-purple background
description: A small round pig-like creature is depicted mid-bounce, elevated above the ground. Its most distinctive feature is a coiled spring that serves as its lower body and tail, and a pink sphere or pearl perched atop its head. The creature has a round pink snout and small ears. Its body appears to be in motion, caught in a jumping pose. The background is a cool grey and purple gradient. A faint orb or energy sphere is visible near the creature suggesting psychic energy.
foreground: small round pig-like creature with coiled spring body, pearl on head, mid-bounce
